HDL Visualizations

Lillie Hutchings

2026-07-11

Plots

#violation code plot
ggplot(restaurant_data, aes(x = violation_code)) +
  geom_bar(fill = "steelblue") +
  labs(
    title = "Counts by Category",
    x = "Category",
    y = "Count"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

#critical/not critical plot
ggplot(restaurant_data, aes(x = critical_flag)) +
  geom_bar(fill = "steelblue") +
  labs(
    title = "Counts by Category",
    x = "Category",
    y = "Count"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

#restaurant grade plot
ggplot(restaurant_data, aes(x = grade)) +
  geom_bar(fill = "steelblue") +
  labs(
    title = "Restaurant Inspection Grades",
    x = "Grade",
    y = "Number of Restaurants"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

#most common violation codes
restaurant_data %>%
  count(violation_code, sort = TRUE) %>%
  slice_head(n = 20) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = reorder(violation_code, n), y = n)) +
  geom_col(fill = "tomato") +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    title = "Top 20 Most Common Violation Codes",
    x = "Violation Code",
    y = "Count"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

#most common violation descriptions
restaurant_data %>%
  count(violation_description, sort = TRUE) %>%
  slice_head(n = 15) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = reorder(violation_description, n), y = n)) +
  geom_col(fill = "darkorange") +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    title = "Top 15 Violation Descriptions",
    x = "Violation Description",
    y = "Count"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

#violation codes & descriptions
View(
  restaurant_data %>%
    distinct(violation_code, violation_description) %>%
    arrange(violation_code)
)

#code and grade
restaurant_data %>%
  filter(!is.na(grade), !is.na(violation_code)) %>%
  count(grade, violation_code) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = violation_code, y = n, fill = grade)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    title = "Violation Codes by Restaurant Grade",
    x = "Violation Code",
    y = "Count"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

#grade vs critical
restaurant_data %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(grade),
    !is.na(critical_flag),
    grade %in% c("A", "B", "C")
  ) %>%
  ggplot(aes(
    x = grade,
    fill = critical_flag
  )) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = percent) +
  labs(
    title = "Critical Violations by Restaurant Grade",
    x = "Restaurant Grade",
    y = "Percentage of Violations",
    fill = "Critical Status"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

# Find the 20 most common violation codes
top_codes <- restaurant_data %>%
  filter(!is.na(violation_code)) %>%
  count(violation_code, sort = TRUE) %>%
  slice_head(n = 20) %>%
  pull(violation_code)

# Graph critical status by violation code
restaurant_data %>%
  filter(
    violation_code %in% top_codes,
    !is.na(critical_flag)
  ) %>%
  ggplot(aes(
    x = violation_code,
    fill = critical_flag
  )) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill") +
  scale_y_continuous(
    labels = function(x) paste0(round(x * 100), "%")
  ) +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    title = "Critical Status of the 20 Most Common Violation Codes",
    x = "Violation Code",
    y = "Percentage of Violations",
    fill = "Critical Status"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

Summaries

#grade count & percentages
restaurant_data %>%
  count(grade) %>%
  mutate(percent = round(n / sum(n) * 100, 2))
## # A tibble: 3 × 3
##   grade     n percent
##   <chr> <int>   <dbl>
## 1 A     22343   89.3 
## 2 B      2047    8.18
## 3 C       636    2.54
#violation code count
restaurant_data %>%
  count(violation_code, sort = TRUE)
## # A tibble: 60 × 2
##    violation_code     n
##    <chr>          <int>
##  1 10F             5891
##  2 06C             1952
##  3 06D             1944
##  4 10B             1834
##  5 02G             1527
##  6 02B             1478
##  7 08A             1356
##  8 04L              738
##  9 10G              702
## 10 04A              614
## # ℹ 50 more rows
#10 most common violations
restaurant_data %>%
  count(violation_code, violation_description, sort = TRUE) %>%
  slice_head(n = 10)
## # A tibble: 10 × 3
##    violation_code violation_description                                        n
##    <chr>          <chr>                                                    <int>
##  1 10F            Non-food contact surface or equipment made of unaccepta…  5819
##  2 06D            Food contact surface not properly washed, rinsed and sa…  1944
##  3 06C            Food, supplies, or equipment not protected from potenti…  1918
##  4 10B            Anti-siphonage or back-flow prevention device not provi…  1822
##  5 02G            Cold TCS food item held above 41 °F; smoked or processe…  1519
##  6 02B            Hot TCS food item not held at or above 140 °F.            1468
##  7 08A            Establishment is not free of harborage or conditions co…  1323
##  8 04L            Evidence of mice or live mice in establishment's food o…   727
##  9 10G            Dishwashing and ware washing: Cleaning and sanitizing o…   685
## 10 04A            Food Protection Certificate (FPC) not held by manager o…   597
#num of unique violations
restaurant_data %>%
  summarise(
    unique_violation_codes = n_distinct(violation_code),
    unique_descriptions = n_distinct(violation_description)
  )
## # A tibble: 1 × 2
##   unique_violation_codes unique_descriptions
##                    <int>               <int>
## 1                     60                 101
#grade by violation
restaurant_data %>%
  group_by(grade) %>%
  summarise(
    inspections = n(),
    unique_violations = n_distinct(violation_code)
  )
## # A tibble: 3 × 3
##   grade inspections unique_violations
##   <chr>       <int>             <int>
## 1 A           22343                58
## 2 B            2047                47
## 3 C             636                46
#most common violation by grade
restaurant_data %>%
  group_by(grade, violation_code, violation_description) %>%
  summarise(count = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(grade, desc(count))
## # A tibble: 219 × 4
##    grade violation_code violation_description                              count
##    <chr> <chr>          <chr>                                              <int>
##  1 A     10F            Non-food contact surface or equipment made of una…  5582
##  2 A     06D            Food contact surface not properly washed, rinsed …  1802
##  3 A     06C            Food, supplies, or equipment not protected from p…  1749
##  4 A     10B            Anti-siphonage or back-flow prevention device not…  1712
##  5 A     02G            Cold TCS food item held above 41 °F; smoked or pr…  1300
##  6 A     02B            Hot TCS food item not held at or above 140 °F.      1247
##  7 A     08A            Establishment is not free of harborage or conditi…   997
##  8 A     10G            Dishwashing and ware washing: Cleaning and saniti…   619
##  9 A     04L            Evidence of mice or live mice in establishment's …   528
## 10 A     06F            Wiping cloths not stored clean and dry, or in a s…   516
## # ℹ 209 more rows
#grades w/violation code
restaurant_data %>%
  count(grade, violation_code) %>%
  arrange(grade, desc(n))
## # A tibble: 151 × 3
##    grade violation_code     n
##    <chr> <chr>          <int>
##  1 A     10F             5650
##  2 A     06D             1802
##  3 A     06C             1780
##  4 A     10B             1723
##  5 A     02G             1307
##  6 A     02B             1255
##  7 A     08A             1025
##  8 A     10G              636
##  9 A     04L              538
## 10 A     06F              520
## # ℹ 141 more rows
#dataset summary
restaurant_data %>%
  summarise(
    Total_Records = n(),
    Restaurants = n_distinct(camis),
    Grades = n_distinct(grade),
    Violation_Codes = n_distinct(violation_code),
    Inspection_Dates = n_distinct(inspection_date)
  )
## # A tibble: 1 × 5
##   Total_Records Restaurants Grades Violation_Codes Inspection_Dates
##           <int>       <int>  <int>           <int>            <int>
## 1         25026       25026      3              60             1192

Note that the echo = FALSE parameter was added to the code chunk to prevent printing of the R code that generated the plot.
